summary: Results-driven Engineering Manager with 16+ years of experience in production engineering, incident management, and operational excellence at scale. Proven track record leading global teams ensuring 99.9%+ SLA compliance across mission-critical services. Passionate about building high-performing teams, driving architectural innovation, and scaling reliability without scaling headcount.

details: Drove operational efficiency from 85% to 98% through systematic process improvements, alert optimization, and automation initiatives.
Architected Azure SRE AI Agent platform achieving 30-35% automated resolution and saving 150+ engineering hours annually.
Manged Azure Enterprise Agreement enrollments, subscription management, and capacity planning for enterprise accounts.
Triage advanced networking, storage, and identity issues across multi-vendor cloud environments.
Managed fleet-level health monitoring and troubleshooting from cluster to blade level across Azure platforms.
Built PowerShell automation frameworks saving thousands of manual hours annually in operational toil reduction.
